---
title: "About"
image: image_profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pasquale-c-9108a1133/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/pasq-cat

---

About this blog

This is a personal blog about data science, machine learning, and programming. I will share my thoughts, projects, and tutorials on these topics.
It's the first time I create a blog, so please bear with me as I learn and improve. If you have any feedback or suggestions, feel free to contact me through the links above. Thank you for visiting!
